meaning: vt.流出,发散,散发,脱落,脱皮,摆脱n.分水岭,棚,小屋,工棚,货棚v.把...放入棚内,流下
examples: He was discovered hiding in a shed.
David built us a shed in the back yard.
Vegetarianism has shed its cranky image.
They are air-conditioning for the soul, wines of insouciant, shed-the-sweater sensuality, the sports drink of Mediterranean seductions.
As part of her morning duties, Carolina reaches into the chicken shed to look for eggs.
